rows.label: xs09090100_MSG0002
rows.name:
What is it? I believe I told you to
leave me alone while I am here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09090100_MSG0003
rows.name: It's just... there is a message from Ga Derg.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09090100_MSG0005
rows.name:
From Ga Derg, former Crown Prince of Lars and
current mercenary leader, to Lower Councilor Luxaar:[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09090100_MSG0006
rows.name:
I offer my deepest gratitude for your
generous employment until this day.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09090100_MSG0007
rows.name:
However, we are unable to fulfill
the order to annihilate the Earthlings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09090100_MSG0008
rows.name:
Therefore, with keen sorrow, we
withdraw from Growth's protection.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09090100_MSG0009
rows.name:
Henceforth, we wish to operate as an independent
mercenary band, and humbly report this intention.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09090100_MSG0010
rows.name:
I look forward to the day we meet on
the battlefield as worthy adversaries.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs09090100_MSG0012
rows.name: A mere watchdog dares defy its master!?[ST:wait ]
